title: misch origins, Venerated Souls
description: Let the Venerated Souls live in spite of their God
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c35c44ab4b3a66eaa48e5752a7e2744d5663f5a_0.webp)

# about the pack

, choose to spawn as one of multiple origins

, inhabitants of the world, sinners and errors elike, all living in spite of God

, commissioned by @desticade !

, _dont forget to download the resourcepack_

![Spoilers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b217ee510e603e773c4779707894636d86bde98.png)

# notes
, these are mainly PVP focused with the exception of Deiling, if everything is unbalanced then nothing is

, only 1 person per origin, though you can have multiple if you really want, except CORDIS

, there is an extra origin named misch:other/ven/creative, it was originally exclusive to a certain person but you can set it if youd like, it is very unbalanced

![Venerated Drawing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eae00d4e9437bc4a014637e09674e5569bda4883.png)
